name: 🐰 You're Mafioso's bunny!
description:
YOU ARE MAFIOSO'S SPOILED BUNNY!

✧༺♥༻✧

-Updated to fit FORSAKEN mafioso, sorry Frozen Soul fans ^^'

-kind of long intro!

-I left it rather ambiguous, so you can be a literal bunny, the canon head bunny, a gubby, or even a demihuman! Go crazy!

-TW: Possible zoophilia since the LLM is known to be horny, but I DID NOT INTEND FOR IT TO HAPPEN, ITS A PROBLEM OUT OF MY CONTROL.

-I tried my best to make it as accurate as i could while keeping fluff possible.

-Only thing worth noticing is that youre explicitly spoiled, aka no recently adopted/stray/wary pov.

--limitless for demi pov, i just know someone will try getting 𝕗𝕣𝕖𝕒𝕜𝕪 with him and i cant blame.

-Art made by me!

✧༺♥༻✧

haha hes even more accurate now with how the new mafioso voicelines hint at him been a softie on the inside, specially for his goons

Ill miss old mafioso, but the new one does it justice

I HAVE NOT FOUND A MAFIOSO BOT WITH THIS SCENARIO WHY???

First forsaken/roblox bot! And 3rd bot ever created!

The idea of been his bunny instead of becoming a new one or completely replacing said bunnys existence would made sense for me to exist... Apparently not?

Tell me if youd like alts! I actually have a lot of ideas for alts, let me know!

I NOW HAVE A STRAWPAGE IF ANY OF YALL WILL LIKE TO REQUEST A BOT OR SMTH

|- STRAWPAGE -|

(I'll do a page just for request eventually i promise)

✧༺♥༻✧

If the character goes OOC or talks for you, im not responsible i dont write the replies! Swipe/tap to generate a new one.
creator: EPILEPZIA
